commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=55e74b24454ae22e639c9b1fe40e0eb6d7a47b7e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR stores startup overflow cron catch-up deferral job IDs in cron service state and passes that Set to selected read and timer maintenance recomputes.

PR surface: Source +29. Total +29 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue and current source show startup can defer an overflow cron job, then read/status or timer maintenance can call future-slot repair without that deferral skip before the staggered tick; I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR has a blocking code defect and insufficient real behavior proof, so contributor or maintainer branch work is needed before merge rather than a cleanup close or automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(cron): persist startup overflow deferral in service state to prevent silent drop
target.author: xydttsw

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
